_comment: BOUNDED monorepo generalization slice for platform (TS: apps/api, apps/fhir-sync, apps/ddt; Dart: apps/frontend_flutter). DELIBERATELY SMALL (~3-4 per mechanism, 20 records). Every lexical/structural symbol was grepped repo-wide across BOTH languages first and kept ONLY if it has exactly one def in one file/language (favor-unambiguous-gold, hard). Globs are deep monorepo paths. Per-item "lang"/"globs" let this ONE spec mix TS and Dart targets under a single generator run (run with --lang typescript as the default; Dart items carry "lang": "dart"). Structural targets are TS-only on purpose — the generator's Dart is_def_line recognises type defs but NOT method/constructor decls, so a Dart call-derivation would mis-count a signature as a call site (see README 'Symbols rejected on platform'). Gold derived mechanically (reproducible); test files included by global policy. Verified against platform at 2026-06-03.

glob.query: TypeScript Zod model files under apps/api
the per-app Dockerfiles at the repo root

regex.query: TypeScript files with a default export
